__fixture__.name: automation_recipe_group
__fixture__.scenario: An automation recipe (a migration-import recipe) runs and rewrites a generated lockfile plus one workspace manifest. The local-history lane writes one local_history_group_record (group_kind = automation_recipe_run, snapshot_class = automation_ai_checkpoint). One member is a content-addressed snapshot of the workspace manifest; the generated lockfile member is handled elsewhere via capture_mode = metadata_plus_reference_only and is demonstrated in the companion fixture generated_artifact_metadata_reference.json. This fixture exercises the automation_recipe_runner actor class and the retained_by_support_case_reference retention class.

side_effect_summary: Automation recipe run rewrote one workspace manifest and refreshed one generated lockfile; lockfile member uses metadata_plus_reference_only capture.
notes: Support case pins this group via retained_by_support_case_reference; the generated-lockfile member in the companion fixture demonstrates omission_reason = omitted_generated_artifact_use_lineage.
